zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强整理走势
zh.content:
当前价格维持在1.45附近，整体呈现窄幅震荡格局。从结构来看，价格仍站稳于20日均线1.437上方，说明中短期多头尚未完全失守，但上涨动能有所减弱，市场进入整理阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD柱值为正且略有扩张，暗示多头动能仍在，但缺乏进一步放量支持，可能限制上行空间。RSI数据缺失，但从价格行为判断，市场处于中性偏强区间，尚未进入超买或超卖状态。

关键支撑位关注1.445一线，其次为20日均线1.437附近；若跌破该区域，可能转入弱势整理。上方阻力集中在1.452-1.460区间，短期多次测试未有效突破，形成明显压制。

交易策略上，建议以区间思路为主，接近支撑可尝试轻仓做多，止损设于1.437下方；若突破1.460并伴随量能放大，可顺势追多。若跌破关键支撑，则应转为观望或短空应对。

Use professional but accessible language\n4. No labels, no meta-commentary\n5. Start immediately with the content (no title needed)\n\nBegin:")

XRP/USD is trading just above its 20-day simple moving average at 1.43709, which keeps the short-term structure modestly bullish despite the flat 24-hour performance. The narrow daily range between 1.4486 and 1.45226 suggests consolidation after a recent recovery phase. Price action near 1.45 is important because this area has repeatedly acted as a pivot zone. A sustained close above 1.4525 would likely confirm renewed buying interest and shift momentum toward the next resistance band. 

The MACD reading of 0.00658 remains positive, indicating that bullish momentum ist.com/cryptocurrencies/news/cryptocurrencies-price-prediction-ripple-solana-aave-asian-wrap-21-april-202604210614?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *FXStreet*

The MACD reading of 0.00658 remains positive, indicating that bullish momentum is still present even though the signal line is unavailable. With price holding above the SMA(20), buyers retain a slight advantage. RSI data is missing, but broader XRP market readings have recently hovered in neutral territory near 50–55, implying that the pair is neither overbought nor oversold. That leaves room for another upward move if volume improves and resistance gives way.

If that level fails, downside pressure could accelerate toward 1.4300 and potentially 1.4200. On the upside, resistance appears at 1.4525, then 1.4600, with a more significant barrier near 1.5000. XRP has struggled repeatedly below the 1.45–1.50 region, making it the key zone to watch for any breakout attempt.

More cautious traders may prefer waiting for a pullback toward the SMA(20) before entering.
